author: Brij Lal, P.
title: Arya Updesh
gloss: Seventeen discourses on religious and moral subjects.
publisher: The author who is a teacher in the Khalchián School

author: Shahzada Ram, Lala
title: Ishwar Puja
gloss: A monotheistic discourse on prayer, its methods and importance.
notes: Same Arya author as Mukti ka Satya Gyan (Q3 p46 s74).

flags.issue: printed 1037 but that number was catalogued in Q3 for a different work and Q4 regs run 1165+ — possibly misprint for 1307

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Pingura Sri Guru Nanak Dev ji
gloss: A photograph of the cradle of Guru Nanak, the founder of the Singh religion.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 188, dated the 12th December, 1910.
notes: First ART section in the 1910 catalogs: seven copyright-registered devotional photographs of Guru Nanak janamsakhi scenes (serials 1–7, regs 1386–1392, copyright Nos. 188–194), artist-printed, 50 copies each — sacred images entering the copyright regime.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Bal Lilha Siri Guru Nanak Dev ji
gloss: A photograph of Guru Nanak as a child playing with other children.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 189, dated the 12th December, 1910.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Taswir Guru Nanak Dev ji Maharaj Panda Wali
gloss: A photograph of Guru Nanak at school.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 190, dated the 12th December, 1910.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Taswir Guru Nanak Dev ji Maharaj Sarap Wali
gloss: A photograph showing how a serpent protected Guru Nanak from the heat of the summer sun.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 191, dated the 12th December, 1910.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Siri Goru Nanak Dev ji Maharaaj Taswir Kayara Sahab Wali
gloss: A photograph of Guru Nanuk pointing to a field.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 192, dated the 12th December, 1910.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Taswir Khara Sauda Siri Guru Nanak Dev ji
gloss: A photograph of Guru Nanak showing how he invested the money given to him by his father for the purposes of trade. The money was spent in feeding fakirs.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore, No. 193, dated the 12th December, 1910.

author: Lahora Singh, B.
title: Taswir Tambu Sahib Siri Guru Nanak Dev ji Maharaj
gloss: A photograph of Guru Nanak in which his father is shown as having discovered him in his place of concealment where he had gone after spending the money given to him in feeding the fakirs.
copyright: B. Lahora Singh, Lahore; No. 194, dated the 12th December, 1910.
